A

addRecord(TableRecord) - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Adds a new record to the tickets table.
Animateable - Interface in com.models
The Animateable interface provides methods for displaying and updating the visual representation of a vehicle.
animateVehicleOnWires(Vehicle, Line, Line, Duration, Duration, TableRecord) - Method in class com.code.VehicleAnimator
Animates a vehicle on two wires over two durations, then adds a record and removes the vehicle from the root.

C

Camera - Class in com.models
The Camera class is responsible for monitoring the speed of vehicles and issuing tickets based on their speeds.
Camera() - Constructor for class com.models.Camera
Constructs a new Camera object.
Car - Class in com.models
The Car class represents a car which is a type of vehicle.
Car(int, Color, int, int) - Constructor for class com.models.Car
Constructs a new Car with the specified lane, color, speed before, and current speed.
com.code - module com.code
 
com.code - package com.code
 
com.models - package com.models
 

D

detectVehicle(Vehicle) - Method in class com.code.VehicleSampler
Detects a vehicle using the camera.
displayVehicle() - Method in interface com.models.Animateable
Displays the vehicle in a StackPane.
displayVehicle() - Method in class com.models.Car
Displays the car as a StackPane containing a rectangle and a label.
displayVehicle() - Method in class com.models.Truck
Displays the truck as a StackPane containing a rectangle and a label.

G

generateCar(Vehicle) - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Generates a car on the wires based on the provided vehicle object.
getAddVehiclesButton() - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Getter for the add vehicles button.
getColor() - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Gets the color of the vehicle.
getContinueSimButton() - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Getter for the continue simulation button.
getCounter() - Method in class com.models.Camera
Gets the current value of the ticket counter.
getHeight() - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Gets the height of the vehicle.
getId() - Method in class com.models.TableRecord
Gets the unique identifier for the record.
getId() - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Gets the unique identifier of the vehicle.
getLane() - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Gets the lane in which the vehicle is driving.
getRecord(Vehicle) - Method in class com.code.VehicleSampler
Generates a record for a given vehicle.
getSpeed() - Method in class com.models.TableRecord
Gets the current speed of the vehicle.
getSpeed() - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Gets the current speed of the vehicle.
getSpeedBefore() - Method in class com.models.TableRecord
Gets the speed of the vehicle before the current speed.
getSpeedBefore() - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Gets the speed of the vehicle before the current speed.
getStopSimButton() - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Getter for the stop simulation button.
getTicketIssued() - Method in class com.models.TableRecord
Gets the ticket issuance status for the vehicle.
getTicketsTotal() - Method in class com.code.VehicleSampler
Gets the total number of tickets issued.
getVehicles() - Method in class com.code.VehicleSampler
Gets the list of vehicles.
getWidth() - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Gets the width of the vehicle.

H

hideAddedLabel() - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Hides the 'added' label.

I

incrementDeservedTotal() - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Increment the deserved total by the number of tickets issued.
initAnimator(VehicleAnimator) - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Initializes the VehicleAnimator for the controller.
initController(SpeedingController) - Method in class com.code.VehicleAnimator
Initializes the controller for the animator.
initialize() - Method in class com.code.SpeedingController
Initializes the controller's components and sets up the initial state.
initiateTests(Vehicle) - Method in class com.models.Camera
Initiates the tests on the speed of the vehicle.

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.code.MainApp
The main entry point of the application.
MainApp - Class in com.code
The MainApp class serves as the entry point for the Road Speeding simulation application.

S

Sets the color of the vehicle.
setCounter(int) - Method in class com.models.Camera
Sets the value of the ticket counter.

Sets the height of the vehicle.

Sets the unique identifier of the vehicle.

Sets the unique identifier for the record.

Sets the lane in which the vehicle is driving.

Sets the current speed of the vehicle.

Sets the current speed of the vehicle.
setSpeedBefore(int) - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Sets the speed of the vehicle before the current speed.
setSpeedBefore(String) - Method in class com.models.TableRecord
Sets the speed of the vehicle before the current speed.
setTicketIssued(String) - Method in class com.models.TableRecord
Sets the ticket issuance status for the vehicle.
setWidth(int) - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Sets the width of the vehicle.

Shows the 'added' label.
SpeedingController - Class in com.code
The SpeedingController class controls the behavior and functionality of the application's UI elements.
SpeedingController() - Constructor for class com.code.SpeedingController
 
start(Stage) - Method in class com.code.MainApp
Initializes the main application window and starts the simulation.

T

TableRecord - Class in com.models
The TableRecord class represents a record in a table, typically used to store information about vehicles such as their ID, speeds, and ticket issuance status.
TableRecord(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.models.TableRecord
Constructs a new TableRecord with the specified ID, speed before, current speed, and ticket issuance status.
toString() - Method in class com.models.Vehicle
Returns a string representation of the vehicle, including its lane, speed before, and current speed.
translateDuration(int) - Method in class com.code.VehicleSampler
Translates a vehicle's speed into a duration.
Truck - Class in com.models
The Truck class represents a truck which is a type of vehicle.
Truck(int, Color, int, int) - Constructor for class com.models.Truck
Constructs a new Truck with the specified lane, color, speed before, and current speed.

U

updateSpeedLabel() - Method in interface com.models.Animateable
Updates the speed label displayed on the vehicle's graphical representation.
updateSpeedLabel() - Method in class com.models.Car
Updates the speed label of the car.
updateSpeedLabel() - Method in class com.models.Truck
Updates the speed label of the truck.

V

Vehicle - Class in com.models
The Vehicle class represents a vehicle with various attributes such as color, id, speed, and lane.
Vehicle(int, Color, int, int) - Constructor for class com.models.Vehicle
Constructs a new Vehicle with the specified lane, color, speed before, and current speed.
VehicleAnimator - Class in com.code
The VehicleAnimator class handles animations of vehicles on wires.
VehicleAnimator(Pane) - Constructor for class com.code.VehicleAnimator
Constructs a new VehicleAnimator with the specified root pane.
VehicleSampler - Class in com.code
The VehicleSampler class is responsible for generating and managing a sample of vehicles.
VehicleSampler(int) - Constructor for class com.code.VehicleSampler
Constructs a new VehicleSampler with the specified sample size.
